# Repository Metadata

## GitHub About

Suggested description:

Kindario is an HTML, CSS, and JavaScript charity template for donation campaigns, volunteer recruitment, humanitarian relief, and nonprofit storytelling.

## Notes

- Keep all repository-facing copy in English.
- Do not list automated assistants as contributors.
- Keep the public repository focused on the static template source and governance files.
